'''ngathuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kymography|kymography]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-th-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kymography|kymography]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngathuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæthiwith|ngæthiwith]] || [[word:ngæthiwij|ngæthiwij]] || [[word:ngæthiwish|ngæthiwish]] || [[word:ngæthiwi|ngæthiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngathuthuwuth|ngathuthuwuth]] || [[word:ngathuthuwuj|ngathuthuwuj]] || [[word:ngathuthuwush|ngathuthuwush]] || [[word:ngathuthuwu|ngathuthuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngathuwuth|ngathuwuth]] || [[word:ngathuwuj|ngathuwuj]] || [[word:ngathuwush|ngathuwush]] || [[word:ngathuwu|ngathuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngathufwuth|ngathufwuth]] || [[word:ngathufwuj|ngathufwuj]] || [[word:ngathufwush|ngathufwush]] || [[word:ngathufwuf|ngathufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngathuwuthu|ngathuwuthu]] || [[word:ngathuwuju|ngathuwuju]] || [[word:ngathuwushu|ngathuwushu]] || [[word:ngathuwuku|ngathuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngathuwuth|ngathuwuth]] || [[word:ngathuwuj|ngathuwuj]] || [[word:ngathuwush|ngathuwush]] || [[word:ngathuwu|ngathuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngathuwuthul|ngathuwuthul]] || [[word:ngathuwujul|ngathuwujul]] || [[word:ngathuwushul|ngathuwushul]] || [[word:ngathuwukul|ngathuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngathuwuthuthu|ngathuwuthuthu]] || [[word:ngathuwujuju|ngathuwujuju]] || [[word:ngathuwushushu|ngathuwushushu]] || [[word:ngathuwuku|ngathuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngathuwuthun|ngathuwuthun]] || [[word:ngathuwujun|ngathuwujun]] || [[word:ngathuwushun|ngathuwushun]] || [[word:ngathuwukun|ngathuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngathuwuthuoro|ngathuwuthuoro]] || [[word:ngathuwujuoro|ngathuwujuoro]] || [[word:ngathuwushuoro|ngathuwushuoro]] || [[word:ngathuwukuoro|ngathuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
